column_key.csv_sha256: SHA256 of source csv artifact for fixture day when source files exist; null means not applicable in this synthetic retrofit fixture.
column_key.offset_first: First source offset included in day/mode fingerprint.
column_key.offset_last: Last source offset included in day/mode fingerprint.
column_key.quantity_sum: Sum of quantity for the day and mode, represented as decimal string.
column_key.quote_volume_sum: Sum of quote quantity for the day and mode, represented as decimal string.
column_key.row_count: Row count in fingerprinted output for the day and mode.
column_key.rows_hash_sha256: SHA256 of canonicalized day/mode output rows.
column_key.zip_sha256: SHA256 of source zip artifact for fixture day when source files exist; null means not applicable in this synthetic retrofit fixture.
